title: Miniature set with chick for dollhouse in 1:12 scale 6
description: A cozy and charming miniature farm-style scene in 1:12 scale — entirely handcrafted. The set includes a tiny yellow chick, a rustic metal teapot, a wooden crate filled with eggs, slices of bread, and a small bowl with jam. Every detail was carefully sculpted and painted by hand to create a warm countryside breakfast atmosphere. All elements are securely attached to the base, making the piece ready to place inside a dollhouse kitchen, farm scene, or miniature display. Perfect…
